taxonomy: Eusteralis linearis is classified within the family Myrtaceae. This plant is further grouped under the genus Eusteralis. The species Eusteralis linearis is native to Western Australia. It is a shrub or small tree species that belongs to the angiospermic plant kingdom. Eusteralis linearis is categorized under the division Magnoliophyta.
